title: Fix wire unpacked array to slice convert to wider unpacked array
body:
Testcase:
```
module our(y, wire1, wire2);
        input wire wire1[3:3];
        input wire wire2[2:2];
        output wire y[1:0];

        assign y = {wire1, wire2};
endmodule
```

Errors:
```
In file included from Vour__ALL.cpp:5:
./Vour___024root__DepSet_hd6c43f43__0.cpp:14:29: error: assigning to 'CData' (aka 'unsigned char') from incompatible type 'CData[1]' (aka 'unsigned char[1]')
    vlSelf->y[1U] = vlSelf->wire1;
                    ~~~~~~~~^~~~~
./Vour___024root__DepSet_hd6c43f43__0.cpp:15:29: error: assigning to 'CData' (aka 'unsigned char') from incompatible type 'CData[1]' (aka 'unsigned char[1]')
    vlSelf->y[0U] = vlSelf->wire2;
                    ~~~~~~~~^~~~~
2 errors generated.
```

Verilator should either print some errors, or succeed to build the code. The generated C++ code shouldn't just fail.

Version: 5.008
clang-14
FreeBSD 13.1
